files.notes: This file contains the complete Guide Lessons section with 4 distinct lessons for November 1916. Lesson II appears to be just a header with no content, while the other three lessons have substantial content. The lessons cover Theology, Work/Business, Genealogy/Art, and Home Economics as indicated in the typical Relief Society Magazine structure.
